source · 
pub type TableFlownodeSetCache = CacheContainer<TableId, HashSet<FlownodeId>, CacheIdent>;
Expand description

TableFlownodeSetCache caches the [TableId] to FlownodeSet mapping.

Aliased Type§

    name: String,
